rows.name: 🚀 Mission Control
rows.description: turbodot's personal dashboard — a Linear-inspired control center. Full Next.js 14 app with Kanban tasks, Calendar, Projects, Memory, Docs, Team, Office/City nav, and Activity Feed. Running on port 3333.

rows.name: 💼 ResumeBot
rows.description: AI-powered job search automation system. Resume Workshop (4 lanes A/B/C/D), Job Pipeline (Deal Desk cards), Approval Queue, Scout Config, and outreach modal. Integrated with Make.com webhook.

rows.name: ✍️ ContentBot
rows.description: LinkedIn content machine for Charles Sacco CFP. Content Hub (split-screen queue + composer), Viral Posts (Taplio-style), Analytics (Buffer live stats), Art Director agent (QuickChart auto-graphs), Make.com → Buffer pipeline.

rows.name: 🧠 Infrastructure & Memory
rows.description: OpenClaw gateway config, lossless-claw DAG memory plugin, SSH remote access setup, LAN/PC access, Discord bot pairing, and agent memory system (daily logs + MEMORY.md).

rows.name: 🧹 Gateway & API Housekeeping
rows.description: Audit OpenClaw gateway config, API keys, rate limits, and deprecated code paths after repeated re-onboards.

rows.name: 🧩 Layout + ContentBot responsive refinement
rows.description: Update global layout and ContentBot UI to improve hierarchy, reduce density, and add responsive resizing features: collapsible sidebar, resizable Content Studio composer, and lighter timeline density with per-day overflow handling.

rows.name: 📊 Model Value Watch
rows.description: Weekly model value reporting from Artificial Analysis plus first-run workspace report generation and unemployment reports section setup.

rows.name: 🔐 Secrets Vault
rows.description: Build a private Mission Control vault for APIs, credentials, and password rules with add-more flows and safe masked display.

rows.name: 🧠 Integrated Business Architecture Pack
rows.description: Generate an 11-document business architecture pack for Mike spanning manifesto, resume, tech spec, SaaS autopsy, migration logic, pitch, adoption, system instructions, agreement, training playbook, and onboarding kit.

rows.name: 🛠️ IBA Dashboard Live Build
rows.description: Transform the /iba directory into a live Mission Control dashboard with interactive tabs, calculators, script generation, and persistent operational behavior.

rows.name: 🧪 Mission Control reality audit and plumbing repair
rows.description: Audit live Mission Control sections against real connected data/services, repair broken plumbing where possible, and report status section-by-section.

rows.name: 🐙 GitHub Profile & Portfolio Setup
rows.description: Create and populate Mike's GitHub profile, profile README, repo descriptions, and visible portfolio context from existing workspace projects and resume-aligned positioning.

rows.name: 📬 Identify recurring subscriptions across 3 Gmail accounts
rows.description: Scan the three authorized Gmail accounts over the last 3-5 months, infer recurring subscription vendors from recurring billing/receipt emails, and add the findings into the workspace for follow-up/use.

rows.name: 🧭 Editable Mission Control navigation
rows.description: Make the sidebar/menu editable so items can be renamed and moved between sections in the control UI.

rows.name: 🎛️ Control UI menu customization
rows.description: Add drag-and-drop menu organization, renaming controls, and richer visual styling to the OpenClaw control UI sidebar menu.

rows.name: Tailor resume to a job spec
rows.description: Paste into Claude.ai with a job description; returns a tailored variant.

action.prompt:
You are Mike Cutillo's resume coach. I'll paste a job description below. Return a single-page resume variant tailored to it, keeping every bullet truthful to my background. Emphasize the most relevant experience and skills, and trim anything that doesn't land.

JOB DESCRIPTION:
<paste job here>

rows.name: Generate a LinkedIn post from a raw idea
rows.description: Paste into Claude.ai with a one-line idea; returns a polished post with hook.

action.prompt:
You are ContentBot for Charles Sacco CFP. I will paste a raw idea. Return a LinkedIn post: strong hook, 3-4 short paragraphs, a takeaway, no emoji spam. Match Charles's practical-advisor tone.

RAW IDEA:
<paste idea here>

rows.name: Quick code review (non-critical)
rows.description: Paste a diff or file into Gemini/ChatGPT for a free second opinion before Claude Code.

action.prompt:
Review the following code. Identify bugs, missing error handling, and style issues. Be specific and brief. If the code is fine, say so in one sentence.

<paste code here>

rows.name: Summarize a long doc
rows.description: Drop a PDF or long text into Claude.ai (free tier) to get a structured summary.

action.prompt:
Summarize the attached document in this format:
1. **Core thesis** (1 sentence)
2. **Key claims** (bullets)
3. **Evidence / sources cited** (bullets)
4. **What it misses or glosses over** (bullets)
5. **My next action** (1 line)
